ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2023 Off Calendar

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Oct-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Chris Logan, 415-218-0578 Plaintiff in Pro Per, (In court)
Marc Feldman, Esq., SHEPPARD, MULLIN, RICHTER & HAMPTON LLP 619.338.6500 mfeldman@sheppardmullin.com, Attorney for Defendants Mercury Insurance Company and Debra Bogaards (via Zoom)

Matter was not timely contested. All parties are present. Court allows argument.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS DEBRA BOGAARDS, MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Attorneys Fees is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

**AFTER HEARING, AN ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS DEBRA BOGAARDS, MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES IS SIGNED. **

Appearances:
Christopher Logan, 415-218-0578, self-represented plaintiff appearing on his own behalf;
Marc Feldman, Esq. of Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton, LLP, Tel:619.338.6500, for defendant (via zoom video conference).

The matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, Defendants' MOTION TO STRIKE [ANTI-SLAPP; CCP SECTION 425.16] is taken under submission.

Judge: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Tamara Harrison, CSR #4609, E-mail: tamarawillat@sbcglobal.net, Tel: 415.272.1753. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, the court ruled as follows: Defendants' MOTION TO STRIKE [ANTI-SLAPP; CCP SECTION 425.16] is granted. Order signed. (302/RBU)

Defendants Mercury Insurance Company And Debra Bogaard'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys' Fees

Appearances:
Christopher Logan, 415-218-0578, self-represented plaintiff appearing on his own behalf;
Marc Feldman, Esq. of Sheppart, Mullin, Richter & Hampton, LLP, Tel:619.338.6500, for defendant (via zoom video conference).

The matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, Defendants Mercury Insurance Company And Debra Bogaard's Motion For Attorneys' Fees is taken under submission.

Judge: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Tamara Harrison, CSR #4609, E-mail: tamarawillat@sbcglobal.net, Tel: 415.272.1753. (302/RBU)

*****After hearing, the court ruled as follows: Defendants' motion for attorney fees is ordered off calendar as premature. Order signed. (302/RBU)

Christopher Logan, 415-218-0578, self-represented plaintiff appearing on his own behalf;
Marc Feldman, Esq. of Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton, LLP, Tel:619.338.6500, for defendant (via zoom video conference).
